'''hashungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oak|oak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oak|oak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hashungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæshingith|hæshingith]] || [[word:hæshingij|hæshingij]] || [[word:hæshingish|hæshingish]] || [[word:hæshingi|hæshingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hashushunguth|hashushunguth]] || [[word:hashushunguj|hashushunguj]] || [[word:hashushungush|hashushungush]] || [[word:hashushungu|hashushungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hashunguth|hashunguth]] || [[word:hashunguj|hashunguj]] || [[word:hashungush|hashungush]] || [[word:hashungu|hashungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hashufngufth|hashufngufth]] || [[word:hashufngufj|hashufngufj]] || [[word:hashufngufsh|hashufngufsh]] || [[word:hashufnguf|hashufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hashunguthu|hashunguthu]] || [[word:hashunguju|hashunguju]] || [[word:hashungushu|hashungushu]] || [[word:hashunguku|hashunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hashunguth|hashunguth]] || [[word:hashunguj|hashunguj]] || [[word:hashungush|hashungush]] || [[word:hashungu|hashungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hashunguthul|hashunguthul]] || [[word:hashungujul|hashungujul]] || [[word:hashungushul|hashungushul]] || [[word:hashungukul|hashungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hashunguuthuthu|hashunguuthuthu]] || [[word:hashunguujuju|hashunguujuju]] || [[word:hashunguushushu|hashunguushushu]] || [[word:hashunguuku|hashunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hashunguthun|hashunguthun]] || [[word:hashungujun|hashungujun]] || [[word:hashungushun|hashungushun]] || [[word:hashungukun|hashungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hashunguthuoro|hashunguthuoro]] || [[word:hashungujuoro|hashungujuoro]] || [[word:hashungushuoro|hashungushuoro]] || [[word:hashungukuoro|hashungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
